name: Wraith
effect: Devour this card ▶ Assassinate a troop at that spy's site.
flavour: Only their hatred still binds them to this plane. Pray they never direct it upon you.

name: Skeletal Horde
flavour: They heed the summons of spellcasters who call them from their stony tombs and ancient battlefields, or rise of their own accord in places saturated with death and loss

name: Carrion Crawler
effect: Devour a card in the market. Instead of replacing it with the top card from the market deck, replace it with this card.
flavour: “I love the big grubbers: they eat the dead and they're easy to outrun!” – Lippo, derro sage

name: Vampire Spawn
effect: Return another player's troop or spy.
flavour: Known for their ravenous hunger for blood, no creature would willingly share the dark with a vampire's spawn.

name: Cultist of Myrkul
effect: • Devour this card ▶ at end of turn, promote up to 2 other cards played this turn.
flavour: In life or death, we will all serve him.

name: Flesh Golem
effect: Devour this card ▶ + Assassinate a troop.
flavour: An earth spirit bound by frail flesh and bone; no wonder its existence is fury.

name: Ghost
effect: • Return one of your spies ▶ For the rest of your turn treat the top card of the devoured deck as if it was in the market.
flavour: Sometimes, killing your enemies isn't as final as it seems.

name: Wight
effect: • Devour a card in your hand ▶ Supplant a troop.
flavour: In return for waging eternal war upon the living, these mortals are granted undeath.

name: Ravenous Zombies
flavour: Their will has been torn away and all that remains is their insatiable hunger.

name: Minotaur Skeleton
effect: • Devour this card ▶ Assassinate up to three white troops at a single site.
flavour: “Any bones will do. The bigger the better.” – Hommet Shaw

name: Ogre Zombie
effect: Supplant a white troop anywhere on the board.
flavour: “The enemy may be strong, but soon that strength will be ours to command.” – Valindra Shadowmantle

name: Revenant
effect: Assassinate two troops. Then, if you have 8 or more troops in your trophy hall, promote this card.
flavour: They have one year to either taste sweet vengeance or crumble to dust.

name: Banshee
effect: Place a spy. If another player's spy is at that site, gain 3 power.
flavour: Where a banshee makes her home, no mortal soul is welcome.

name: Conjurer
effect: • Return one of your spies ▶ Recruit up to 2 cards that each costs 3 or less without paying its cost.
flavour: Plenty more where that came from.

name: Necromancer
effect: • Promote this card, or a card from your hand or discard pile.
flavour: “You fools think I fear death? I am its master!”

name: Mummy Lord
effect: • Take a white troop from any trophy hall and deploy it anywhere on the board.
flavour: His empire will rise again.

name: High Priest of Myrkul
effect: Return another player's troop or spy.
At end of turn, you may promote any number of Undead cards played this turn.
flavour: “Death is only the beginning.”

name: Death Knight
effect: Gain 1 VP for every 5 player troops in your trophy hall.
flavour: Either flee now, or join him. To choose to fight, is to choose to die.

name: Lich
effect: Place a spy. If another player's troop is at that site, take up to 2 troops from their trophy hall and deploy them.
flavour: Every graveyard is his barracks, and every defeat a temporary setback.

name: Vampire
effect: • Promote a card from your discard pile, then gain 1 VP for every 3 cards in your inner circle.
flavour: “Give in to me, my dear, and you shall live forever by my side.”
